info.title: Orion profile and entry API
info.description: Frozen Orion 1.5.0 contract containing the 17 approved profile, account, health, entry, Review, and Reflection operations. Supabase Auth remains external; ownership is derived exclusively from a verified bearer token.

get.description: Returns a fixed liveness status and reads no user, dependency, or secret state.

patch.summary: Update display name and IANA timezone

delete.summary: Delete the authenticated Auth user and all application data
delete.description: Requires a fresh Supabase reauthentication proof and exact confirmation text.

get.summary: List owner-scoped entries with bounded source previews and initial themes

Cache-Control.description: Prevents shared or durable caching of decrypted journal previews.

get.summary: Restore the authenticated user's active encrypted text draft

200.description: Active draft or empty draft response

put.summary: Create, replace, or clear the authenticated user's active encrypted text draft

200.description: Saved active draft, or empty response after a blank clear

delete.summary: Discard only the authenticated user's active unsent text draft

200.description: Empty draft response; submitted entries and replay metadata are unchanged

post.summary: Submit the saved server draft as one text entry and synchronously process it

200.description: Saved-draft replay or successfully reclaimed failed entry

post.summary: Queue one dated historical entry for durable extraction

202.description: Entry and durable processing work accepted

Cache-Control.description: Prevents shared or durable caching of entry identity and status.

post.summary: Transcribe and process one idempotent audio entry

parameters.name: entry_date
parameters.description: Omit to derive user-local today; explicit null is invalid.

audio.contentType: audio/wav, audio/x-wav, audio/mpeg, audio/mp4, audio/x-m4a, audio/webm, audio/ogg

201.description: Created audio entry containing only encrypted transcript content

200.description: Same-user key/date replay resolved before reading the upload

get.summary: Read decrypted source and complete owner-scoped evidence

post.summary: Retry processing for a failed owner-scoped entry

200.description: Retry completed or entered a terminal failed state without partial rows

post.summary: Replace feedback for one owner-scoped Review item
post.description: Identical normalized feedback is idempotent. A changed response invalidates the cached Reflection and requests asynchronous recalculation.

get.summary: Read the authenticated user's aggregate persisted Reflection
get.description: Idempotently requests an immediately claimable synthesis job when the latest accepted basis is eligible, then reads persisted state. Model work remains asynchronous in the shared worker. The all range is capped at 90 days.

200.description: Aggregate Reflection, including valid pending and insufficient-evidence states.

put.description: Idempotently overlays feedback without changing the immutable snapshot or invoking a model.

bearerAuth.description: Supabase access token; never a service-role key.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Opaque 1-128 character key with no leading or trailing whitespace.

Unauthorized.description: Missing, malformed, invalid, or expired bearer token; occurs before handler work.

NotFound.description: Missing and other-user resources are indistinguishable.

Conflict.description: Stable state, idempotency, busy-claim, or active-work conflict.

UnsupportedMedia.description: Declared MIME and actual signature/container do not match an allowed format.

ProviderFailure.description: Sanitized upstream transcription or model failure after the attempt ceiling.

ServiceUnavailable.description: Retryable application, dependency, migration, or timeout failure.

EntryContentUnavailable.description: Fixed response for every envelope, key, AAD, or tag failure.

content.description: Blank or whitespace-only content clears the active draft.

value.content: I felt calmer after speaking this aloud.

extracted_memories.content: I felt calmer after speaking this aloud.

value.content: I walked before work and felt calmer. I decided to protect two quiet hours for the proposal. I noticed how much steadier I feel when I keep that promise to myself.

ideas.content: I decided to protect two quiet hours for the proposal.

extracted_memories.content: I walked before work and felt calmer.
